title: Powershot
description: Allows various projectiles (e.g. arrows, tridents, etc.) to break user-specified blocks.
body:
![Powershot](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/uploads/images/logo.png) **For Fabric and Forge**
_Note for Fabric users: This mod requires the [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)_

**Issue Tracker** - - **Powershot** allows various projectiles to break blocks. Affected projectiles include arrows, tridents, and various third-party mod projectiles (YMMV with mod projectiles). You can specify which blocks are breakable through a [configuration file](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/config). I recommend first reading about [how the mod works](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/explain) to better understand how to use it.

![example0](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/uploads/images/example0.gif) ![example1](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/uploads/images/example1.gif) ![example2](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/uploads/images/example2.gif) ![example3](https://gitlab.com/qolq/powershot/-/wikis/uploads/images/example3.gif)
